record.field: rate = payslip._rule_parameter('vn_bhxh_ee_rate') base_sal = payslip._rule_parameter('vn_base_salary') cap = base_sal * payslip._rule_parameter('vn_bhxh_cap_multiplier') ins_salary = contract.insurance_salary or contract.wage result = -round(min(ins_salary, cap) * rate / 100)

rate = payslip._rule_parameter('vn_bhyt_ee_rate') base_sal = payslip._rule_parameter('vn_base_salary') cap = base_sal * payslip._rule_parameter('vn_bhxh_cap_multiplier') ins_salary = contract.insurance_salary or contract.wage result = -round(min(ins_salary, cap) * rate / 100)

rate = payslip._rule_parameter('vn_bhtn_ee_rate') regional = payslip._rule_parameter('vn_regional_wages') bhtn_cap = regional.get('1', 4960000) * payslip._rule_parameter('vn_bhxh_cap_multiplier') ins_salary = contract.insurance_salary or contract.wage result = -round(min(ins_salary, bhtn_cap) * rate / 100)

# Gross-up: NET + BHXH_NV + PIT = GROSS # PIT phụ thuộc vào GROSS → cần tính lặp net_desired = contract.wage insurance_ee = abs(result_rules['BHXH_EE']['total'] + result_rules['BHYT_EE']['total'] + result_rules['BHTN_EE']['total'])
self_ded = payslip._rule_parameter('vn_self_deduction') dep_ded = payslip._rule_parameter('vn_dependent_deduction') dep_count = employee.dependent_count or 0 total_ded = self_ded + dep_count * dep_ded
blist = payslip._rule_parameter('vn_pit_brackets')
# Lặp để tìm GROSS gross = net_desired + insurance_ee for _i in range(50): taxable = gross - insurance_ee - total_ded if taxable <= 0: pit = 0 elif not employee.tax_resident: pit = round(taxable * 0.20) else: pit = 0.0 for fr, to, rate in blist: if taxable <= fr: break upper = taxable if (to == 0 or taxable < to) else to pit += (upper - fr) * rate / 100.0 pit = round(pit) new_gross = net_desired + insurance_ee + pit if abs(new_gross - gross) < 1: gross = new_gross break gross = new_gross
result = gross

self_ded = payslip._rule_parameter('vn_self_deduction') dep_ded = payslip._rule_parameter('vn_dependent_deduction') dep_count = employee.dependent_count or 0 insurance_ee = abs(result_rules['BHXH_EE']['total'] + result_rules['BHYT_EE']['total'] + result_rules['BHTN_EE']['total']) taxable = categories['GROSS'] - insurance_ee - self_ded - (dep_count * dep_ded)
if taxable <= 0: result = 0 elif not employee.tax_resident: result = -round(taxable * 0.20) else: blist = payslip._rule_parameter('vn_pit_brackets') pit = 0.0 for fr, to, rate in blist: if taxable <= fr: break upper = taxable if (to == 0 or taxable < to) else to pit += (upper - fr) * rate / 100.0 result = -round(pit)

rate = payslip._rule_parameter('vn_bhxh_er_rate') base_sal = payslip._rule_parameter('vn_base_salary') cap = base_sal * payslip._rule_parameter('vn_bhxh_cap_multiplier') ins_salary = contract.insurance_salary or contract.wage result = round(min(ins_salary, cap) * rate / 100)

rate = payslip._rule_parameter('vn_bhyt_er_rate') base_sal = payslip._rule_parameter('vn_base_salary') cap = base_sal * payslip._rule_parameter('vn_bhxh_cap_multiplier') ins_salary = contract.insurance_salary or contract.wage result = round(min(ins_salary, cap) * rate / 100)

rate = payslip._rule_parameter('vn_bhtn_er_rate') regional = payslip._rule_parameter('vn_regional_wages') bhtn_cap = regional.get('1', 4960000) * payslip._rule_parameter('vn_bhxh_cap_multiplier') ins_salary = contract.insurance_salary or contract.wage result = round(min(ins_salary, bhtn_cap) * rate / 100)
